raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "California State Assembly Speaker Robert Rivas and 57 Democratic Assemblymembers announced they will stop communications from official state accounts on X due to concerns over disinformation and the platform’s lack of content moderation.",
    "There are real risks with relying on a private company as a channel for communications in a democratic society.",
    "Hate speech is prevalent on X, and the company has no accountability.",
    "The proliferation of fake or inauthentic accounts contributes to misinformation on X.",
    "Misinformation on platforms like X has real-world consequences, including causing people to reject essential federal assistance during emergencies.",
    "X significantly lags in usage behind other major social media platforms as of February 2025.",
    "X is the ninth most used social media platform globally and the eighth most popular social platform for users aged 18 and over.",
    "X has significantly fewer monthly active users than its competitors, making it one of the least popular social media sites globally.",
    "X has only 104 million users in the United States, compared to YouTube, LinkedIn, Instagram, Facebook, and TikTok which have higher user counts."
  ]
}
```
